title: Chocorite
body:
# Chocorite **Hi!** This pack replaces Netherite by Chocorite. In pack you have: - Netherite Tools as **Chocorite Tools** on the Pocky stick, - Netherite Armor as **Chocorite Armor**, - Ancient Debris have changed name for **Ancient Cocoa**, - Netherite Scrap as **Chocolate Scrap**, - Netherite Ingot as **Chocorite Bar**, - Block of Netherite as **Block of Chocorite**.
**Hope you like it!**
